implBasis: Self-built generic <T> read↔edit toggle state machine composing Field controls (default edit = <Input>/<Textarea>). Consumes makeEditSettleKeyHandler (Enter/Esc + IME guard SSOT), fieldDisplayTextClass, --field-px/--field-height tokens, invisible absolute <button> Pressable for read state.

falseClaims.宣稱: A11y Keyboard 表格 edit 態欄:`Enter` commit（無條件敘述）
falseClaims.真實code行為: 多行模式 (multiline prop) 走 makeEditSettleKeyHandler({commitOnEnter:false}) → plain Enter = 換行 (不 commit)，Cmd/Ctrl+Enter 才 commit (field-edit-keys.ts:55-63 + inline-edit.tsx:217)。同一 spec L66 已正確載明多行 Enter=換行，故 A11y 表格與 L66 兩段互相矛盾；表格的絕對 Enter=commit 僅適用單行。
